things.name: Wine Tasting - Cricova Winery
things.description: Underground wine city with 120km of tunnels holding millions of bottles - largest wine cellar

things.name: Milestii Mici Winery
things.description: Guinness World Record largest wine collection with 1.5 million bottles in golden tunnels

things.name: National Museum of History of Moldova
things.description: 2,000 years of Moldovan history including the famous Orheiul Vechi rupestrian complex

things.name: Stefan cel Mare Central Park
things.description: City's green heart with the triumphal arch, fountains and the famous Stefan the Great statue

things.name: Orheiul Vechi Monastery
things.description: 13th-century cave monastery carved into a limestone cliff above the Raut River

things.name: National Archaeology and History Museum
things.description: Moldova's most important museum with the Golden Hoard of Chisinau treasure

things.name: Pushkin Museum
things.description: House where Alexander Pushkin lived in exile 1820-1823 and wrote some of his greatest works

things.name: Transnistria Day Trip
things.description: Visit the breakaway Soviet-style republic across the Dniester with USSR monuments and stamps

things.name: Nativity Cathedral
things.description: 19th-century Orthodox cathedral in the city centre with the bell tower campanile

things.name: Central Market (Piata Centrala)
things.description: Bustling market with fresh produce, honey, pickles and traditional Moldovan wine
